round: 7 of the GPU sec10 GEMM-fusion (attention) axis
goal: port the N204 roofline-GEMM toolkit (TMA cp.async.bulk.tensor + 128B shared-memory swizzle + double-buffered K/V tiles + large 64x64 MMA tiles + mma.sync.m16n8k16) into the fused softmax(QK^T/sqrt(d))V inner GEMMs; measure ratio vs cuBLAS-TC + % of roofline
pre_registered_target: ratio <= 1.10 vs cuBLAS-TC (>= ~90% of cuBLAS ceiling) on at least one shape (N in {2048,4096}, d=64), AND report achieved % of sm_120 FP16-tensor-core roofline
host: ubu-2/ubu-1 RTX 5070 sm_120 (48 SMs) -- PHASE 2 timed fire (gated on 0 compute procs)

vs_round4_base.warps_per_cta: 1 -> 4 (full SM compute, 2x2 warp layout over 64-row tile)
vs_round4_base.inner_mma: wmma.mma.sync m16n16k16 (16x16 frag) -> mma.sync.m16n8k16 (N204 large-tile MMA, 8/warp/K-step)
vs_round4_base.loads: wmma.load.*.global (HBM each subtile) -> cp.async.bulk.tensor TMA SWIZZLE_128B
vs_round4_base.pipeline: none (TMA->wait->mma) -> double-buffered K/V (slot[k+1] DMA overlaps mma[k])
vs_round4_base.Q_reuse: re-read from HBM every K-block -> TMA-loaded ONCE into smem (resident)

ptxas_compile_only: PENDING (PHASE 1 -- requires Linux GPU host; Mac has no ptxas)

static_review.mma_layout: QK^T = mma.row.col B=K via ldmatrix.trans (K^T); P.V = mma.row.col B=V non-trans (contraction over keys along smem rows)
static_review.mbarrier_double_buffer: per-slot parity = (kb>>1)&1; prologue arrives slot0, in-loop issue-next arrives the other slot -- exactly one arrive per slot use (traced, no double-arrive, no race)
static_review.register_hygiene: lane consts (r55/r71/r90/r91) set once + read-only; mma/scatter scratch (r74-97,r150-151) disjoint from softmax/finalize (r100-116); kb/parity dedicated named regs

numeric_gate: rel_rowscale <= 1e-2 vs f64 CPU ref (honest per-row-scaled metric); validated by fa_mma_oracle.cu (IDENTICAL mma.sync.m16n8k16 + ldmatrix sequence, unswizzled smem) -- PENDING fire
results_per_shape: PENDING PHASE 2 (timed fire on uncontended GPU)

invariants.codegen_untouched: compiler/codegen/*.hexa UNTOUCHED (hand-emit PTX path); .cu/.c are oracle/host only
